description: Pre-approved reciprocity concessions. Low actual cost, high perceived value. Use to create deal momentum without discounting.
note: These concessions are pre-approved by Josef. No approval loop needed. Track which concessions correlate with closes.

concessions.name: Extended trial period
concessions.trigger: Prospect asks for more time to evaluate
concessions.script: I can extend the trial by a week so your team has more time to see the impact. No strings attached.

concessions.name: Complimentary onboarding call
concessions.script: I'll personally walk your team through setup — usually we charge for this, but I want to make sure you get maximum value from day one.

concessions.name: Early access to upcoming feature
concessions.description: Beta access to next feature release
concessions.trigger: Prospect asks about roadmap or missing features
concessions.script: I can give you early access to [feature] — it's coming in the next release and you'd be one of the first to use it.

concessions.name: Custom quarterly business review
concessions.description: Personalized QBR deck with insights specific to their business
concessions.trigger: Prospect needs to justify ROI to leadership
concessions.script: I'll build a custom quarterly review showing exactly how this impacts your metrics. Makes it easy to show your team the ROI.

concessions.name: Priority support channel
concessions.trigger: Prospect worried about support or responsiveness
concessions.script: For the first 90 days, you'll have a direct line to me — any question, any time. We usually reserve this for our premium tier.

concessions.name: Free strategy session
concessions.description: 30-min strategy call focused on their specific challenge
concessions.trigger: Prospect is interested but unclear on how to apply the solution
concessions.script: Let me block 30 minutes to map out exactly how this would work for your specific situation. No commitment needed.

rules.offer_order: Always offer concession BEFORE any price discussion. Never concede and discount simultaneously.
rules.reciprocity_note: After giving a concession, immediately follow with a small ask: 'In return, could you get me a meeting with [decision maker]?' or 'Could you share feedback within the first week?'
